ques: Check out NCAAW recruiting on ESPN, what colleges are the top three players from?
answer: On ESPN's espnW NCAAW recruiting rankings (2027 class), the top three players are #1 Kaleena Smith (uncommitted/None), #2 Ivanna Wilson Manyacka (uncommitted/None), and #3 Caroline Bradley (committed to LSU) — i.e., only Caroline Bradley has a college (LSU), while the top two are not yet committed.
